name: exact_lookup_oracle_v1
notes: Main-thread exact-lookup answer benchmark grounded in real local SQLite message evidence.

entries.query: Where did I share the First Dollar case studies link?
entries.why: These messages contain the exact docs.firstdollar.money/case-studies link, either standalone or inside a richer explanatory message.

entries.query: Find the builder program Notion doc I shared
entries.why: These are the grounded Notion links for the First Dollar x Clanker builder program.

entries.query: Show me where I sent app.firstdollar.money after the call with @Inaaralakhani
entries.why: This message contains both the Inaaralakhani context and the app.firstdollar.money/docs.firstdollar.money links.

entries.query: Find the wallet address 0xbC7B5142e390BBaABF8826dAE7E1ef9C609Df327 I sent with send 400 only
entries.why: This message contains the exact address plus the disambiguating phrase 'send 400 only ser'.

entries.query: Find the gstack GitHub link I sent
Find the Karpathy gist I shared
entries.why: A unique gist.github.com URL with Karpathy in the path.

entries.query: Where did I send the OpenClaw X link?
Show me the Google Meet link mhf-stnj-uuv
Find the docs.firstdollar.money radar winners link
Where did I share the First Dollar admin leaderboard link?
entries.why: Both messages contain the app.firstdollar.money/admin/leaderboard URL.

entries.query: Find the Huddle01 Product Hunt link I sent
entries.why: A unique Huddle01 URL referenced alongside Product Hunt.

entries.query: Where did I share my wallet address with Rahul?
entries.why: No clean local exact message currently ties a wallet/address share to Rahul context.

entries.query: Which group did I post this URL in: https://example.com/docs/onboarding?
entries.why: Synthetic URL should not falsely match local traffic.
